title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: Organizations are shifting away from expensive SaaS platforms like CRMs to build proprietary AI-powered alternatives. Chinese AI models are presented as cost-effective alternatives for these system overhauls.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers the trend of organizations replacing costly SaaS tools such as CRMs with proprietary AI-powered systems they build themselves. It frames Chinese AI models as cost-effective options for powering these in-house replacements. The takeaway centers on cost optimization: shifting away from subscription platforms toward custom builds, with model evaluation as the lever for choosing affordable alternatives.
